scored_papers.title: Reply to "Comment on "Chiral symmetry restoration, the eigenvalue density of the Dirac operator, and the axial U(1) anomaly at finite temperature""
scored_papers.abstract: We respond to the comment by Matteo Giordano [1] on our article [2]. We find -- and [1] itself acknowledges -- that the proposed counterexamples intended to refute our argument violate a crucial assumption of QCD at high temperatures, namely that every gluonic observable is an analytic function of the squared quark mass, $m^2$. We further point out a technical mistake found in [1]. We conclude that the arguments presented in [1] are not valid.
scored_papers.reason: 共同研究者Aoki氏とFukaya氏による、有限温度QCDのカイラル対称性回復とaxial U(1)アノマリーを巡るGiordano氏との論争への応答📐🔥⚛️
scored_papers.summary: Giordanoの反例はグルーオン演算子がm^2の解析関数という高温QCDの前提に違反すると指摘し、技術的誤りも示す🧮📊
